title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Granules India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Granules India Advisory Limited:
Granules India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India Advisory Limited!
